changes.change: Fixed GL penalty double-counting: CR Member Account instead of CR Penalty Income for penalty portion in repayment
Extracted processPenaltiesAndStatus() helper, eliminating duplication between executeProcessing() and processLoan()
Fixed log to report actual paid count instead of unpaidPenalties.size()
Added test for penalty portion crediting Member Account

verification: mvn test -pl sacco-loan,sacco-ledger -am -DskipITs: 84 tests, 0 failures, BUILD SUCCESS

commit.message: fix(loan-penalty): resolve GL double-counting, extract penalty helper, fix log
